---
title: Themes
listing:
  contents: "*.md"
  type: table
  fields: [title, tags, processed_at]
  field-display-names:
    title: "Title"
    tags: "Tags"
    processed_at: "Updated"
  field-links: [title]
  sort: "processed_at desc"
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: true
  page-size: 50
---

Cross-paper syntheses produced by the `theme-synthesizer` agent. See [open_questions.md](open_questions.md) for a running list of cross-paper contradictions.
